prompt: To what was Nixon alluding when he stated, "I am not a crook"?
system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: When Richard Nixon stated, "I am not a crook," he was alluding to the Watergate scandal. This statement was made during a press conference on November 17, 1973, in response to questions about his involvement in the scandal and allegations of financial improprieties. Nixon was asserting his innocence regarding any illegal activities related to the break-in at the Democratic National Committee headquarters at the Watergate complex and the subsequent cover-up.
